title: montia fontana subsp. lamprosperma
intro: Montia fontana subsp. lamprosperma, also known as the water miner's lettuce or winter purslane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Portulacaceae. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic. Montia fontana subsp. lamprosperma is often prepared as a tea or used in infusions, and it can also be consumed raw in salads, providing a rich source of vitamins and minerals.
